attributes.additional_details: Reinstating a plaque at the site of Ianto’s Shrine in Cardiff Bay recognises its cultural significance and the lasting impact of Torchwood. Fans travel from across the UK and beyond to visit filming locations, bringing valuable tourism revenue to local shops, cafés, and businesses. Preserving this connection supports the local economy and celebrates Cardiff’s role in a globally loved series.
attributes.background: I would like the government and council to reinstate a permanent plaque at the former site of Ianto’s Shrine in Cardiff Bay, recognising its cultural and community significance.

rejection.details:
We can't accept your petition because the UK Government and Parliament aren't responsible for the issue you raise.

You could raise your issue with a local councillor who represents you. You can use this page to find out who your local councillors are, and how to contact them: https://www.gov.uk/find-your-local-councillors
